station_address: 3VW2+V8M, Nehru Rd, Gujarati Society, Vile Parle East, Vile Parle, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400057
text:
Always crowded and line for fuel and Air for Tyre is same but if the line is missed than getting back in the queue is hell lot of a job.
The pump staff is not help-full or caring. Recommended not to Try Washroom.

station_address: 3VW2+V8M, Nehru Rd, Gujarati Society, Vile Parle East, Vile Parle, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400057
text:
Truly a well-managed petrol pump with very nice people. It's very nice to hear that there are still good people helping others by employing them and training them from scratch.

Best part is that unlike other petrol pums you don't have to get down to find the QR code sticker as they bring it with them to the car window. It is a little crowded but the line is always moving so that is fine.

station_address: 3VW2+V8M, Nehru Rd, Gujarati Society, Vile Parle East, Vile Parle, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400057
text:
Here there is too much crowd. And it's always full there is a huge line and waiting time is nearly 10 to 15 mins. If you are in hurry will not recommend also the service is slow and ppl do not listen to them when they ask not to use cell phone ppl do not listen unnecessary troubles the service provider. It gets difficult for the team to manage the crowd and people together.

But i feel ppl shld have common sense and use brains and not use cellphone at a petrol pump  or even near it

station_address: 3VW2+V8M, Nehru Rd, Gujarati Society, Vile Parle East, Vile Parle, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400057
text: Easily visible from traffic. Wide drive through for cars and other vehicles. Accepts cash, cards as well as mobile payments. Public toilet available for use. Drinking water facility is also provided. Tire air filling and checking also done here.
